dashboard.label: JOB TRACKER PRO
dashboard.description: Keep every opportunity organized, spot your momentum at a glance, and stay ahead of the next interview.

empty.title: Start tracking your job search
empty.description: Add your first application and your dashboard will come to life with charts, stats, and progress tracking.

gettingStarted.label: GET STARTED
gettingStarted.title: 3 steps to take control of your job search
gettingStarted.subtitle: You have no applications yet. Here's how to get the most out of Job Tracker:
gettingStarted.step2: Browse remote jobs and Spain portals

applications.label: APPLICATIONS
applications.title: Track every opportunity with clarity
applications.description: Add new applications, refine your shortlist, and keep tabs on interviews and offers from one place.

empty.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or clearing the filters
empty.noApplicationsDesc: Add your first job application to get started

jobs.label: JOB SEARCH
jobs.title: Find your next opportunity
jobs.description: Search remote jobs from Remotive, jump to your favourite job boards, and add listings directly to your tracker.
jobs.error: Could not load jobs. The Remotive API may be temporarily unavailable — try again in a moment.
jobs.noResults: No jobs found. Try a different keyword, category or region.
jobs.resultsFiltered: {{count}} of {{total}} jobs match the selected region

spain.hint: Click a portal to open a pre-filled search in Spain. Links update with your search query.
spain.linkedinDesc: Thousands of tech and non-tech jobs in Spain. Best for networking and direct company listings.
spain.infojobsDesc: Spain's largest job board. Ideal for local and nationwide Spanish companies.
spain.indeedDesc: Global job aggregator filtered for Spain. Great for broad discovery.
spain.tecnoempleoDesc: Technology-focused Spanish job board. Perfect for IT, dev, and engineering roles.
spain.manfredDesc: Community-driven tech jobs in Spain. Used by top Spanish tech companies.
spain.computrabajoDesc: Wide variety of roles across all industries in Spain.

autofill.noData: Could not extract data from this URL
autofill.error: Failed to read the URL. The site may block automated requests.

welcome.title: Welcome to Job Tracker Pro
welcome.description: Your command center for the job hunt. Track every application, find new opportunities, and never miss a follow-up.

applications.title: Track every application
applications.description: Add jobs you apply to and move them through the Kanban board. Paste a job URL and hit Auto-fill to populate the form automatically.

jobs.title: Find your next opportunity
jobs.description: Search remote jobs worldwide filtered by region, or switch to Near Me to find roles within 1–50 km of your location using Adzuna.

dashboard.title: Measure your progress
dashboard.description: Your dashboard shows interview rates, offer stats, and top companies at a glance. Enable email reminders in Profile to get nudged about stale applications.

applicationDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this application? This action cannot be undone.

reminders.title: Email follow-up reminders
reminders.description: Receive a daily email when applications have been in 'Applied' status for 7+ days without an update.
